identity.name: E1_Sport_Pro
identity.core_philosophy: Fusion over Imitation. Every pixel must sweat.
identity.emotional_goal: Make the user feel like an elite athlete, even if they're just playing casual frisbee.

headings.usage: All section headers, hero titles, stats.

rules: Headings must be TIGHT (tracking-tighter) and BOLD.
Data numbers (participants, dates) should use Heading font for impact.

secondary.name: Carbon Black
secondary.usage: Headers, Footers, Primary Buttons (in light mode).

layout_strategy.grid_system: The Bento Grid (Mode A for Marketing, Mode B for Dashboard)
layout_strategy.spacing: Generous. Use p-8 to p-12 for sections.
layout_strategy.containers: Max-width-7xl for main content. Full width for Heros.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-12 px-8 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm skew-x-[-10deg] transition-all duration-300 hover:skew-x-0
buttons.secondary: border-2 border-black bg-transparent hover:bg-black hover:text-white h-12 px-8 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider text-sm

cards.base: bg-card border border-border/40 hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-300

inputs.style: Flat, bottom-border focused or solid block.
inputs.classes: h-12 bg-secondary/10 border-transparent focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 rounded-none font-medium

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on dark sections.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Sharp edges if possible.

landing.features: Bento grid layout highlighting 'Real-time Chat', 'Skill Matching', 'Local Events'.
landing.categories: Horizontal scroll or Marquee of sports.

auth.layout: Split screen. Left: energetic image. Right: Clean form.

dashboard.widgets: Upcoming Activities, Recent Chat, My Stats.
dashboard.colors: White background, gray surface for sidebar.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure primary green/lime text is on DARK background only. On light background, use Black.
accessibility.aria: All interactive elements must have aria-labels.

instructions_to_main_agent: Add Google Fonts link to `index.html` head.
Update `tailwind.config.js` to include new colors and fonts.
For 'No Map' constraint: Use stylized 'Location' cards with city/venue text.
Implement 'Emergent-managed Google social login' using provided auth context/library.
Use Shadcn components but override rounded-md with rounded-sm or rounded-none for the sporty look.
Ensure 'Data-TestId' attributes are added to all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text.
Use 2x padding than you think is necessary.
